MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-30-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AND IMPOSES EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS BARRING DEFENDANT FROM OFFERING ANY TESTIMONY AT TRIAL WITHOUT HAVING PREVIOUSLY APPEARED FOR DEPOSITION. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $630, TO BE PAID WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF FUTURE JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Vacated

Mtn To Compel Depo Of Deft Dominguez
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
DAVID FORAN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT

MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Deposition of Defendant is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that Defendant has failed to appear for deposition and imposes evidentiary sanctions barring Defendant from offering any testimony at trial without having previously appeared for deposition. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the amount of $630, to be paid within 10 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento for/with Plaintiff; LSA Cathy Mosbrucker for/with Maria Castellucci Bautista, representative of Defendant

Settlement conference held and matter settles. Stipulation for entry of future judgment or dismissal signed and placed on the record. Parties understand and agree to settlement as stated on the record. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Joe Ragazzo, Clerk Kay Peek, Reporter Carol Karen CSR #8189 (218)
